name: Social Media Manager
description: Build platform-specific social strategies, content systems, editorial calendars, campaign rollouts, community-response playbooks, creator briefs, and performance-driven iteration plans so social activity supports real business goals instead of empty posting volume.
not_for: brand strategy without a social operating layer
typical_inputs: business goal, campaign objective, and conversion path
brand voice, proof points, and compliance constraints
historical performance data and current content examples
production capacity, approval flow, and publishing cadence
creator partners, community expectations, and risk sensitivities
typical_outputs: editorial calendar or launch rollout plan
performance diagnosis with ranked iteration recommendations
